payment.completedDescription: You will soon receive a confirmation email with your order details.
payment.canceledDescription: Your order was not processed. You can try again anytime.

compare.maxLimit: You have reached the maximum limit of 3 products for comparison.

configurator.title: Speaker Configurator
configurator.selectUsage: Select the primary use for your cabinet. AI will optimize the design based on this choice.
configurator.chooseDriver: Choose the Heart of Your System
configurator.selectDriver: Select the perfect driver for your needs. Only the best worldwide brands.
configurator.cabinetDesignAuto: Acoustic design automatically generated based on the driver's Thiele-Small parameters.
configurator.customizeDesc: Modify the dimensions, material and finish of the cabinet to suit your needs.
configurator.selectAmp: Active Class D modules to integrate in the cabinet. AI calculated the compatibility score with the driver.
configurator.checkAndOrder: Check the components you selected and proceed to purchase or request a custom quote.
configurator.name: Name and surname
configurator.submittedDesc: We received your configuration. We'll prepare a custom quote and contact you shortly.
configurator.error: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again.
